sample_command_snippets.compute_flag_pandas:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]')
for s in df['sensor'].unique():
    mask = (df['sensor']==s)
    low_avg = df[mask & (df['humidity_pct']<=65)]['bias_pm25'].mean()
    df.loc[mask, 'humidity_overread_flag'] = ((df.loc[mask, 'humidity_pct']>65) & (df.loc[mask, 'bias_pm25']>low_avg))
df.to_csv('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]', index=False)
sample_command_snippets.create_output_txt: echo -e "See [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] humidity_associated_overread=YES; mean_bias=4.0; MAE=4.0\nSensor_B: humidity_associated_overread=NO; mean_bias=-1.2; MAE=1.2" > [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]
